checks.title: Yentl mobile app
checks.visibleTextStart: Skip to main content yentl. Start MOBILE APP Yentl on iOS, Android, and mobile web. The mobile app path is installable web-first in v1: share into Yentl, import files, use the microphone, review saved sessions, and hand the result to room mode. Pick source Saved work Share a link or text Open the same source-aware workspace that iOS Share Sheet and Android share intents target. Pick a source Use microphone, URL, upload, text, document, direct media, or one-claim mode. Open saved work Resume, exp

checks.title: Yentl — Live fact-check & rhetoric analysis
checks.visibleTextStart: Skip to main content Live capture stopped yentl Choose your source path Start with Live, URL, or File. Then choose the specific branch Yentl should use. On mobile, start with a shared link, file, text, or microphone. Mobile browsers cannot expose another tab's audio the same way desktop Chrome can. Yentl can still analyze shared URLs, files, pasted text, and live microphone audio. Live Something is happening or playing now. Microphone Listen to a live room, call, class, or meeting. URL You have

checks.title: Yentl — Live fact-check & rhetoric analysis
checks.visibleTextStart: Skip to main content Live capture stopped Back to sources Transcript or text Paste or drop a transcript Accepts plain text, Markdown, Word, PDF text layers, SRT, or VTT. Speaker labels like David: are auto-detected before Yentl builds claims and markers from the text. 35 chars · ~9 tokens · 2 non-empty lines Load validation TXT Load validation MD Load validation DOCX Load validation PDF Load validation VTT Load validation SRT Detect speaker labels (e.g. David:) Process transcript DETECTED STRUCT

checks.title: Yentl — Live fact-check & rhetoric analysis
checks.visibleTextStart: Skip to main content yentl / Saved sessions + New session Saved sessions ACCOUNT SYNC Account sync is not configured for this Yentl environment. Local fallback No saved sessions yet. Start an analysis first. Once Yentl has transcript, claims, markers, or a report brief, the Save action adds a snapshot to this library. Guest saves stay in this browser. Signed-in saves can sync to your account when the cloud backend is configured. Start a new analysis Review local-save privacy
